calendar.matters:
Mtn To Vacate Judgmnt
Off Calendar Feb-14-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
April Perkins, 916.929.1481 for Petitioner/Opposing party GBP6.
Vincenzo Signorett, 415.816.9219 Respondent/Moving on his own behalf.

Argued. The Respondent asks to present points and authorities that were missing in his motion. Counsel for the Petitioner objects. She is appearing by Court call and can not see any unserved documents. The Respondent is not allowed to present new information. Mr. Signoretti requests that the motion is denied without prejudice. Ms. Perkins objects.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: RESPONDENT VINCENZP SIGNORETTI Mtn To Vacate Judgmnt is DENIED without prejudice. Defendant's papers do not include a notice of motion or points and authorities. It is unclear what legal authority Defendant relies on for the motion. Defendant does not meet all of the requirements of CCP 473(b), CCP 473(d) or CCP 473.5. Order signed. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Petition For Relase Of Property From Lien
Off Calendar Jan-14-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
(916-929-1481, ext. 412) April Perkins for Plaintiff/Moving party .
No other appearances.

ARGUED. Ms. Perkins stated that she complied with the tentative ruling rule, that she called and left a message for Mr. Signoretti and that the proof of service was filed on January 09, 2019. The clerk checks the ROA and confirms that a filed proof of service has been filed.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Release Of Property From Lien
Off Calendar Oct-17-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER IN THE MATTER OF GBP6, L.P. Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Release Of Property From Lien is OFF CALENDAR. No proof of service for the Petition or Notice of hearing on file. Proof of Service for Declaration is insufficient at is not by the actual server. CRC 3.1300(c). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported (D501)
